sys_atf_step.description: Confirm that the 'Heading <h1>: Loaner Device Management' component is enabled, Page area: 'Screen content > Dashboard name is Loaner Device Man...'
sys_atf_step.mugshots_cache_json: {"96b06ec28c62bb46429680fe5e0ee121":"{\"area\":\"default\",\"sn_atf_mugshot_short_description\":\"Heading <h1>: Loaner Device Management\",\"inner_text\":\"Loaner Device Management\",\"sn_atf_mugshot_long_description\":\"Heading <h1>: Loaner Device Management\",\"methods\":[\"click\"],\"sn_atf_mugshot_label\":\"Loaner Device Management\",\"version\":\"26.0\",\"sn_atf_mugshot_label_for_label_path\":\"\",\"interesting_element_path\":[\"body\",\"macroponent-f51912f4c700201072b211d4d8c26010\",\"sn-canvas-appshell-root\",\"sn-canvas-appshell-layout\",\"sn-polaris-layout\",\"sn-canvas-appshell-main\",\"sn-canvas-experience-shell\",\"macroponent-76a83a645b122010b913030a1d81c780\",\"sn-canvas-root\",\"sn-canvas-layout\",\"sn-canvas-main\",\"sn-canvas-screen\",\"screen-action-transformer-923a913b532c0110aab9ddeeff7b1243\",\"macroponent-163a913b532c0110aab9ddeeff7b1241\",\"now-uxf-page\",\"sn-dashboard\",\"data-store-provider\",\"sn-dashboard-main\",\"dashboard-header\",\"now-heading\",\"h1\"],\"get_value_result\":\"Loaner Device Management\",\"sn_atf_mugshot_tag_display_name\":\"Heading <h1>\",\"sn_atf_mugshot_value\":\"\",\"tag\":\"h1\",\"isDisabled\":false,\"label_path\":[\"Screen content\",\"Dashboard name is Loaner Device Man...\"],\"hash\":\"96b06ec28c62bb46429680fe5e0ee121\"}"}
